---
title: "Documentation"
---

**BCFMS-project-management** is a Shiny app for a project management system for the MS core facility.

The MS Core Facility provides services such as ​

- Identification of proteins (in-gel or in-solution)
- In-depth proteome analysis (with and without fractionation)
- Interaction proteomics by Affinity Purification Mass Spectrometry (AP-MS)
- Post-translational modification identification (e.g. phosphorylation, ubiquitination, acetylation or glycosylation). Low stoichiometry modifications can be brought into view by enrichment (e.g. Fe-IMAC for phosphorylation)
- Crosslinking-MS (XL-MS) to extract protein structure distance information
- Intact mass of proteins and other biomolecules as well as small molecules
- Lipidomics / Metabolomics.


If you have any further questions regarding this repository, please do not hesitate to [contact us @ omicsdesk](mailto:omicsdesk.biochem.mpg.de)!

# Chapters

- [Quick Start](chapters/quick-start.html)
- [Setup & Infrastructure](chapters/setup-infrastructure.html)
- [Git & GitHub](chapters/git-github.html)
- [VM installation](chapters/vm-installation.qmd)
- [Deploy & Operations](chapters/deploy-operations.html)
- [Change Log](chapters/change-log.html)

## How to render


```bash
quarto render Documentation/
```

This booklet consolidates all operational and technical documentation for the sequencing Shiny app.


TODO

split the docs into (for now) three parts

1. github-related (move sections from deploy-operations)
2. installation-related (server,shiny, apache2, etc.)
3. set up inside server.
4. ???? deploy steps
